working_on.feature: Active Contract Update Restrictions & Invoice Fix
working_on.notes: ACTIVE contracts can now be updated with restrictions. Invoice DTO fixed to whitelist all frontend fields.

pending_tasks.task: Data migration for existing tenants with string currentRoomId
pending_tasks.notes: Convert string to ObjectId in existing documents

pending_tasks.task: End-to-end testing of invoice creation flow
pending_tasks.notes: Test after DTO fix to ensure all fields pass validation

recent_changes.description: Fixed CreateInvoiceDto: added initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex to DTO, added quantity/isRecurring/_id to ServiceChargeDto
Changed ACTIVE contract badge color from emerald to blue-500 to match dashboard OCCUPIED room card color
Active contract update restrictions: backend strips immutable fields (building, room, contractType, startDate), checks invoice count for meter indexes; frontend disables fields with amber hints
Calendar redesign: Added 4 new event types (DEPOSIT_CHECKIN_DUE/OVERDUE, ACTIVE_CHECKOUT_DUE/OVERDUE) with distinct colors
Fixed tenant currentRoomId being stored as string instead of ObjectId

errors_encountered.error: CreateInvoiceDto whitelist rejection: initialElectricIndex, initialWaterIndex, serviceCharges.quantity/isRecurring/_id not in DTO
errors_encountered.solution: Added missing fields to ServiceChargeDto (quantity, isRecurring, _id) and CreateInvoiceDto (initialElectricIndex, initialWaterIndex)

errors_encountered.error: Tenant currentRoomId stored as string instead of ObjectId
errors_encountered.solution: Updated contracts.service.ts to pass ObjectId, added conversion logic in tenants.service.ts update method

errors_encountered.error: Dashboard contract creation not auto-filling meter indexes
errors_encountered.solution: Added currentElectricIndex/currentWaterIndex setValue calls in ContractForm useEffect for preSelectedRoom

errors_encountered.error: Calendar not showing granular contract status
errors_encountered.solution: Added new CalendarEventType enum values and rewrote getContractEvents logic to differentiate DRAFT (deposit) vs ACTIVE (rental) contracts

decisions_made.decision: ACTIVE contracts allow editing with field restrictions
decisions_made.reason: Building, room, contractType, startDate are immutable. Meter indexes only editable if no invoices exist. Backend enforces + frontend shows visual hints.
Consistency between contract list ACTIVE badge and dashboard OCCUPIED room card border color

decisions_made.decision: Separate modals for Long-term and Short-term invoice creation
decisions_made.reason: Long-term uses utility readings, Short-term uses duration-based pricing - different UX flows

decisions_made.decision: Granular calendar event types based on contract status
decisions_made.reason: DRAFT contracts show check-in events, ACTIVE contracts show checkout events. Overdue detection compares with today's date.

decisions_made.decision: Use initialElectricIndex/initialWaterIndex for both Room and Contract
decisions_made.reason: Semantic consistency - these are the initial values at contract start, not current values
